definition:
1. to work in various colours, to broider, work in embroidery , (Euripides); χορὸν ποίκιλλε he wrought a  χορός of cunning workmanship , (Iliad by Homer) 
2. to embroider  a robe, (Pindar), etc. 
3. generally, to diversify, vary , (Euripides):—;of style, to embellish , (Pindar):—; to speak as in riddles , (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
